notes: v2.4.16 — Purchasing redesign + full editing, live-sync indicators, and Operations Planner improvements. Purchasing: a refined glass look across the module; the PO cost breakdown (shipping/tax/misc) is editable with an instant total; a proper dollar input replaces number spinners; item links are editable with an Open shortcut; a friendlier status-pill menu; cleaner item tables; a green 'Live' dot showing real-time sync on the Requisitions/Purchase Orders tables and detail windows; Convert to PO moved into the requisition header and auto-hidden once converted; plus New Requisition fixes (searchable project picker, money-formatted price, readable date field, Pending-to-Ordered status, wrapping long descriptions). Operations Planner: link entities right from a table row; Flat view now keeps sections/groups with consistent cross-board ordering; sections render as real containers; dropdowns flip up when space is tight; a width-aware contributor filter; and new project boards seed a fuller layout.
